title: Starship Templates
description: Reusable PC starship configurations. Saved once and loaded into any cinematic starship scene. When isCampaignShip is true, post-scene HP/Shield damage persists back to the template so the same vessel carries damage forward between encounters.

x-import-info.notes: Templates with matching IDs are replaced on import. Loading a template into a scene sets scene.starship.templateId so the link is preserved through saveScene/startScene/endScene.

name.description: Display name in the dropdown (e.g. 'The Brassbound — party ship').

isCampaignShip.description: When true, end-of-scene HP/Shield values persist back to this template. Loading the template again uses the persisted values, so damage carries forward across encounters. Default false (one-shot ship).

savedAt.description: Unix ms timestamp of the last save.
